thesis: Probability moved up to moderate after same-day Bloomberg reporting and Reuters follow-on that Stripe has expressed preliminary interest in acquiring all or parts of PayPal. This is still unconfirmed and appears early-stage, not a signed process.
method: Weighted by source credibility and deal-stage evidence: Reuters/Bloomberg high weight; secondary market commentary lower weight unless independently corroborated.

evidence.signal: Bloomberg reports Stripe considering acquisition of all or parts of PayPal.
Reuters follow-on says Stripe has preliminary interest, citing Bloomberg reporting.
Coverage indicates discussions are early and no confirmed formal deal process yet.
